description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted sink unit featuring a rectangular wooden countertop with a circular white ceramic basin set into the left side. A sleek, curved metallic faucet is installed adjacent to the basin, and visible plumbing runs beneath the countertop. The right side of the unit includes a rectangular white cabinet or panel, likely for storage or concealing plumbing. The countertop extends beyond the cabinet, providing a small ledge for placing items. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a combination of wood, ceramic, and metal materials.
description: A minimalist wall-mounted sink with a wooden countertop, white ceramic basin, and metallic faucet, paired with a rectangular white cabinet.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wooden countertop, circular basin, and faucet placement on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular basin, faucet, and the full width of the wooden countertop with the white cabinet below.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the white cabinet and the wooden countertop, with the basin and faucet partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite front view displaying the basin, faucet, and the underside plumbing, as well as the full length of the countertop.
